name: image-finder-skill
description: AI 内容生成系统图片素材检索技能 - 支持多源 Provider 和 AI 生成

scripts.test:pexels: node -e "const finder = require('./index'); finder.searchImages(process.argv[2] || 'nature', { provider: 'pexels', per_page: 5 }).then(console.log).catch(console.error)"
scripts.test:unsplash: node -e "const finder = require('./index'); finder.searchImages(process.argv[2] || 'technology', { provider: 'unsplash', per_page: 5 }).then(console.log).catch(console.error)"
scripts.test:pixabay: node -e "const finder = require('./index'); finder.searchImages(process.argv[2] || 'business', { provider: 'pixabay', per_page: 5 }).then(console.log).catch(console.error)"
scripts.test:ai: node -e "const finder = require('./index'); finder.generateAIImage({ prompt: process.argv[2] || 'a cute robot', provider: 'auto' }).then(console.log).catch(console.error)"
